channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Maya Hawke, Christian Lee Hutson Make First Appearance After Wedding

item.title: Victoria, David Beckham Send Birthday Messages to Brooklyn Amid Feud

item.title: If You Feel Modern Movies Lack Originality, You Should Watch This 2026 Sci-Fi Film

item.description: Liam Neeson’s son Daniel Neeson is on the mend. The Taken actor’s son shared that he recently underwent surgery to address a left ventricle dilation a...

item.title: Scary Movie 6 Risks Repeating The Franchise’s Biggest Mistake (But It Makes Sense)

item.title: David and Victoria Beckham Wish Estranged Son Brooklyn a Happy Birthday
item.description: David and Victoria Beckham may not have spoken to their eldest child Brooklyn Beckham in months ... but they're making sure he feels the birthday love...

item.title: Rapper Quavo Hit With $3 Million Lien for Unpaid Taxes by IRS
